handshake {"server_version":200,"connection_time":"20260405 12:00:00 CET"}
server managed_accounts {"accounts":["DU12345"]}
server next_valid_id {"order_id":1001}
client req_pnl_single {"req_id":"$req1","account":"DU12345","model_code":"","con_id":"265598"}
server pnl_single {"req_id":"$req1","position":"10","daily_pnl":"50.00","unrealized_pnl":"45.00","realized_pnl":"5.00","value":"1895.00"}
client cancel_pnl_single {"req_id":"$req1"}
disconnect
